# Agent TDD checkpoint — handoff brief (`{{ROOT_ID}}`, wave-{{WAVE}})

## Pointers

- Resume protocol: `${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR}/SKILL.md` "Resume bootstrap" (the new Root reaches this via the `/atdd resume {{ROOT_ID}}` slash command — namespaced as `/agent-tdd:atdd resume {{ROOT_ID}}` under Claude Code).
- Event dispatch: PROTOCOL.md §6.1 (terminal / paused / timeout)
- Wave-end housekeeping: PROTOCOL.md §3.5
- Rebase ladder: PROTOCOL.md §3.7
- Log bundles: `{{STATE_DIR}}/wave-{{WAVE}}/logs/`
- Decisions log: `{{STATE_DIR}}/decisions.log` (append-only; resumed Root adds an entry on first turn)
- Watcher state: re-issue per §6.1 — the prior Root's background watcher (if any) is now a dangling no-op.
